mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (order_id, goods_id, reviewer_id, target_id, rating, content, type) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{goodsId}, #{reviewerId}, #{targetId}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{type})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u1.nickname as reviewer_nickname, u2.nickname as target_nickname, g.title as goods_title FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u1 ON r.reviewer_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON r.target_id = u2.id LEFT JOIN goods g ON r.goods_id = g.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM review WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND type = #{type}

SELECT r.*, u1.nickname as reviewer_nickname, u2.nickname as target_nickname FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u1 ON r.reviewer_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON r.target_id = u2.id WHERE r.goods_id = #{goodsId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, u1.nickname as reviewer_nickname, g.title as goods_title FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u1 ON r.reviewer_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN goods g ON r.goods_id = g.id WHERE r.target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, u2.nickname as target_nickname, g.title as goods_title FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u2 ON r.target_id = u2.id LEFT JOIN goods g ON r.goods_id = g.id WHERE r.reviewer_id = #{reviewerId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT AVG(rating) FROM review WHERE target_id = #{targetId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE target_id = #{targetId}
